Liquidator repays the user's full USDC debt and receives the         equivalent xStock collateral plus a 5 % bonus."},"repay(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Repay outstanding USDC debt."},"withdraw(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Withdraw collateral that is not backing outstanding debt."},"withdrawFees()":{"notice":"Withdraw collected borrow fees."}},"notice":"Collateralised borrowing: deposit xStock tokens, borrow up to 70 % of         their current value in USDC \u2014 so a winner can stay in the xStocks         ecosystem while still accessing USDC liquidity for the next game.  Rates & limits (v1 \u2014 no per-block interest accrual)  ----------------------------------------------------  MAX_LTV            70 %   \u2014 maximum you can borrow against collateral  LIQ_THRESHOLD      78 %   \u2014 health factor below this triggers liquidation  LIQ_BONUS           5 %   \u2014 liquidator reward on top of seized collateral  BORROW_FEE_BPS     50 bp  \u2014 one-time 0.5 % fee on each borrow (goes to protocol)  Health factor  -------------  healthFactor = (collateral_value_usdc \u00d7 LIQ_THRESHOLD_BPS) / (borrowed_usdc \u00d7 10_000)  Position is safe when healthFactor \u2265 1.0 (expressed as \u2265 10_000 in BPS form).  Decimal conventions  -------------------  xStock token  : 18 decimals  USDC          : 6 decimals  Oracle price  : 8 decimals  (see xStockToken for the scaling formula)  SCALE = 1e20 (same as a06","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://03329b836d534f81fb502fa42731fae91b09b21092df7c090676077739c88205","dweb:/ipfs/QmQ2YR4bV5jhK3QVwHrRUftSdMWPe2EByYifBJAj7d4EUe"]}},"version":1}

params.usdcAmount: USDC to borrow BEFORE fees (6 dec).

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.token: The collateral token whose debt to repay.
params.usdcAmount: USDC to repay (6 dec). Capped at outstanding debt.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

depositAndBorrow(address,uint256,uint256.notice: Convenience: deposit collateral and borrow in a single call.

getCollateralValue(address,address).notice: Current USDC value of a user's collateral.

getHealthFactor(address,address).notice: Health factor as a BPS value (10_000 = 1.0 exactly at threshold).         Values ≥ 10_000 are safe.

getMaxBorrow(address,address).notice: Maximum additional USDC the user can borrow right now.

liquidate(address,address).notice: Liquidate an under-collateralised position.         Liquidator repays the user's full USDC debt and receives the         equivalent xStock collateral plus a 5 % bonus.

withdraw(address,uint256).notice: Withdraw collateral that is not backing outstanding debt.
